records.question: Which staff submitted documents of type Document for settled Overtime Meal Subsidy claims with an amount claimed of 228.45, where the claim date is on or before 2016-11-15 13:12:02 and the settlement date is exactly 2018-01-21 05:51:01?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT staff.staff_id FROM staff
JOIN claims_documents ON staff.staff_id = claims_documents.created_by_staff_id
JOIN claim_headers ON claims_documents.claim_id = claim_headers.claim_header_id
WHERE claim_headers.date_of_claim <= '2016-11-15 13:12:02' AND claim_headers.claim_type_code = 'Overtime Meal Subsidy' AND claim_headers.date_of_settlement = '2018-01-21 05:51:01' AND claim_headers.amount_claimed = 228.45 AND claims_documents.document_type_code = 'Document' AND claim_headers.claim_status_code = 'Settled'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT Staff_ID FROM Claims_Documents 
JOIN Claim_Headers ON Claims_Documents.Claim_ID = Claim_Headers.Claim_Header_ID 
WHERE Document_Type_Code = 'Document' 
AND Claim_Status_Code = 'Settled' 
AND Amount_Claimed = 228.45 
AND Date_of_Claim <= '2016-11-15 13:12:02' 
AND Date_of_Settlement = '2018-01-21 05:51:01'

records.question: Which staff members have the detail Margaretta and have created Photo documents dated at least 7?

SELECT staff.staff_id FROM staff

WHERE staff.staff_details = 'Margaretta' AND claims_documents.document_type_code = 'Photo' AND claims_documents.created_date >= 7
records.pred_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT Staff_ID FROM Staff 
WHERE Staff_Details = 'Margaretta' 
AND Staff_ID IN (
    SELECT Created_by_Staff_ID FROM Claims_Documents 
    WHERE Document_Type_Code = 'Photo' 
    AND Created_Date >= 7
)

records.question: Who are the staff with details Bo involved in Uniformed policies that started on or before 2016-05-11 14:56:17 and ended on or before 2018-03-15 05:02:00, where claims have an amount claimed of 270.49, claim status and outcome code both are Disputed, and the claim date is on or before 2016-04-10 01:36:18?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT staff.staff_id FROM staff
JOIN claims_processing ON staff.staff_id = claims_processing.staff_id
JOIN claim_headers ON claims_processing.claim_id = claim_headers.claim_header_id
JOIN policies ON claim_headers.policy_id = policies.policy_id
WHERE claims_processing.claim_outcome_code = 'Disputed' AND policies.end_date <= '2018-03-15 05:02:00' AND claim_headers.amount_claimed = 270.49 AND claim_headers.claim_status_code = 'Disputed' AND claim_headers.date_of_claim <= '2016-04-10 01:36:18' AND staff.staff_details = 'Bo' AND policies.start_date <= '2016-05-11 14:56:17' AND policies.policy_type_code = 'Uniformed'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT s.Staff_ID 
FROM Staff s
JOIN Claims_Documents cd ON s.Staff_ID = cd.Created_by_Staff_ID
JOIN Claim_Headers ch ON cd.Claim_ID = ch.Claim_Header_ID
JOIN Policies p ON ch.Policy_ID = p.Policy_ID
JOIN Claims_Processing cp ON ch.Claim_Header_ID = cp.Claim_ID
WHERE s.Staff_Details LIKE '%Bo%'
AND p.Policy_Type_Code = 'Uniformed'
AND p.Start_Date <= '2016-05-11 14:56:17'
AND p.End_Date <= '2018-03-15 05:02:00'
AND ch.Amount_Claimed = 270.49
AND ch.Claim_Status_Code = 'Disputed'
AND cp.Claim_Outcome_Code = 'Disputed'
AND ch.Date_of_Claim <= '2016-04-10 01:36:18'
